class.name: FlatBufferVerifier
class.brief_description: Utility class for verifying the integrity of FlatBuffer data.
class.description: [FlatBufferVerifier] wraps the [code]flatbuffers::Verifier[/code] class. It is used to ensure that a buffer contains valid FlatBuffer data before attempting to read it, helping to prevent crashes or security vulnerabilities from malformed data.

method.name: end_table
method.description: Verifies the end of a table. Returns [code]true[/code] if successful.

method.name: set_buffer
method.description: Sets the buffer to be verified. The verifier will point to the memory of the provided [param byte_array]. [b]Note:[/b] The memory pointers used by the verifier may become invalid if the [param byte_array] is modified or resized.
